name: Jotun
description:
The Jotunn possesses supernatural powers: reading thoughts and seeing people's deepest fears; creating hallucinations (auditory and visual); subjugating the will of victims; moving quickly through the forest; the inability to leave the forest—its power is limited to this territory.

The Jotun has a unique and frightening design: the body of a huge moose; instead of a head, a headless human torso; deer antlers protruding from the shoulders of the torso; the ability to assume human form.

He feeds on the faith and fear of his followers: the more people worship him, the stronger he becomes.
creator: Gelet663
